g.text: NAME:
aws-ssm-params - Manage AWS SSM parameters
USAGE:
aws-ssm-params [global options] <command> [command options]
COMMANDS:
interactive, tui Open the interactive TUI
get Print a parameter value
set Set a String, StringList, or SecureString parameter value
import Import parameter values from stdin or file
export Export parameter values to stdout or file
help, h Shows a list of commands or help for one command
GLOBAL OPTIONS:
--regions value comma-separated AWS regions; when omitted, AWS CLI resolves it from env/profile config [$AWS_S
--all-regions search parameters across all enabled AWS regions (default: false) [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_ALL_REGIONS
--profile value AWS profile [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_PROFILE, $AWS_PROFILE]
--no-color disable colored output (default: false) [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_NO_COLOR, $NO_COLOR]
--names-file value optional file with SSM parameter names to load/filter [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_NAMES_FILE]
--names value [ --names value ] comma-separated SSM parameter names to load/filter [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_NAMES]
--fields value [ --fields value ] comma-separated parameter fields to load/show/import/export; omitted means all fields [$AWS_SS
--without-decryption load SecureString values without KMS decryption (default: false) [$AWS_SSM_PARAMS_WITHOUT_DECR
--help, -h show help
